text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A public training session is held for the media in
preparation for the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text: And that concludes today's public training!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide, excuse me! Could I get a
one-on-one interview with you, please?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
I understand Narita Taishin will also be at the
spring Tenno Sho. As a fellow member of BNW—
choice_data_list: Everyone, please give her some room!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide's consistent performance has been
earning her a lot of attention. While we're
certainly grateful for it...

text_block_list.name: Press
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Biwa Hayahide! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't possibly accommodate every single
interview request. We politely make our way
through the throng of reporters and head home.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you didn't have to be so protective. They
weren't bothering me.
choice_data_list: I need you to stay focused.
I need you to stay focused.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, thank you for making sure they didn't
distract me. By the way, do you happen to be free
this weekend?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's something important happening then, and
it pertains to us both.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The weekend rolls around, and it doesn't take
long to figure out why Biwa Hayahide wants to
spend it with me.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What an absolutely gorgeous day at the
Nakayama Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here she is, the number one favorite of the
Satsuki Sho, Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Listen to those cheers... I guess this is all part of
the Narita Brian package.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-chak!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is in excellent position, but
everyone's hot on her heels coming out of the
first corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In stark contrast to the lively audience, Biwa
Hayahide watches the race unfold in
contemplative silence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're moving at a pretty fast clip. There's only
800 meters to go! This level of intensity is bound
to shake some of them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The pace is fast, but the lead is just barely ahead
of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This might come down to whoever has enough
energy left on the straightaway. I have a feeling
it'll be close...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian! Narita Brian's broken away from the
pack!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's in the lead! She's pulled away by three
lengths—now four! She's widening the gap!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's a total blowout! We have a new record!
Narita Brian has captured her first crown in
devastating fashion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This is incredible, folks! Narita Brian has not only
won the race, she's set a new record!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is now the fastest Umamusume ever
to run the 2,000-meter at the Nakayama
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
That final sprint down the stretch was on a whole
other level. She may be a one-in-a-million
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm going to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can only speculate as to what she might have
said if she had watched this race prior to running
in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what I do know for sure is that she's starting
to sound a lot more like a real fighter lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz, bzzz, bzzz.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? I think you're getting a call.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look at my phone and raise my eyebrows
at the name on the screen.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see. So this year's spring Tenno Sho will be held
at the Hanshin Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the Kyoto Racecourse is being
remodeled, so the venue for the spring Tenno Sho
is being relocated to the Hanshin Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But the problem is...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm, both of them are right-handed courses, but
the slopes are positioned differently. The area
before the finish line at Kyoto is flat, but Hanshin
has a steep incline.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's no use complaining about it, but this
essentially renders all of our data and predictions
useless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, all the work we've done to prepare
for the spring Tenno Sho goes down the drain.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess it's time to make adjustments to
the winning equation again.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. What's wrong? It was always our plan to
prove the equation by applying it practically.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's make the most of what little time we have
and do the best we can.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Just like we did at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to start over from square one. If we do
this, it's going to take up a lot of your time too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Biwa Hayahide who used to be so lost and
indecisive is nowhere to be found anymore.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Uh, Trainer? Why are you looking at me like tha—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
M-my head isn't any bigger than usual! See? It's
completely normal sized!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what life throws at her now, she's
utterly unflappable. She's truly progressed so
much.
